name: Cranberry-Raspberry Freezer Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cranberries in a food processor; process until coarsely chopped.
2. Add raspberries; process until finely chopped.
3. Combine the fruit and sugar in a large bowl. Allow the fruit mixture to stand for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. In a small bowl, combine the liquid fruit pectin and lemon juice.
5. Add the pectin mixture to the fruit mixture; stir constantly for 3 minutes or until most of the sugar dissolves.
6. Pour into jars with lids, leaving 1/2 inch from the top. Wipe off the rims of the jars.
7. Screw on the lids. Allow the jam to stand at room temperature for 24 hours.
8. Store in the freezer. Place in the refrigerator for 1 hour before serving.
9. May be refrozen. Keeps up to 3 weeks in the refrigerator or up to 1 year in the freezer.
